claim.binding_fragment_derivation: first 7 hexadecimal characters of the canonical declaration SHA-256

canonical_declaration.digest_scope: UTF-8 bytes after NFC normalization and LF newline normalization, including the terminal LF

legacy_corpus_root.preimage_serialization: JSON.stringify over the ordered leaves array with object key order name, sha256, size

supplemental_artifacts.name: binding_event_full_hex.txt
supplemental_artifacts.relationship: ASCII hexadecimal encoding of the canonical declaration bytes; excluded from the legacy corpus root

supplemental_artifacts.name: ns_request_signed_example.json
supplemental_artifacts.relationship: HS256 test vector with its symmetric key published; not authenticity evidence

legacy_receipt_interpretation.corrected_semantics: The historical Boolean detects the U+1D30B ingress sigil. It must not be read as evidence that the U+27D0 TD613 seal is present.

legacy_batch_evidence.note: Archived Tauric Diana intake batches may label opaque BEGIN PGP MESSAGE armor as PGP-detached. Those blobs are preserved as historical operator overlays and are not signature-verification evidence.
legacy_batch_evidence.packet_hash_replay: unavailable where the archived batch omits safe_harbor.staged_snapshot
legacy_batch_evidence.node_snapshot_receipts: unavailable where snapshot_ref and receipt_ref are empty

does_not_establish: consent outside the declaration's stated scope
